en: "And you, son of man, take a brick and lay it before you, and engrave on it a city, even Jerusalem.
zh: “人子啊！你要拿一塊磚頭，放在你面前，在上面刻一座城，代表耶路撒冷。

en: And put siegeworks against it, and build a siege wall against it, and cast up a mound against it. Set camps also against it, and plant battering rams against it all around.
zh: 然後安放圍城設施，建造圍城高牆，築起攻城土壘，擺列兵營，四周架起攻城鎚。

en: And you, take an iron griddle, and place it as an iron wall between you and the city; and set your face toward it, and let it be in a state of siege, and press the siege against it. This is a sign for the house of Israel.
zh: 你又要拿一個鐵的煎盤，放在你和城的中間當作鐵牆。你要面向著城，象徵城要被圍困，你就是圍攻那城的。這要作以色列家的預兆。

en: "Then lie on your left side, and place the punishment of the house of Israel upon it. For the number of the days that you lie on it, you shall bear their punishment.
zh: “你要向左邊側臥，承擔以色列家的罪孽。你向左邊側臥多少日子，你擔當他們的罪孽也是多少日子。

en: For I assign to you a number of days, 390 days, equal to the number of the years of their punishment. So long shall you bear the punishment of the house of Israel.
zh: 我已經給你定了日子的數目，就是三百九十天，等於他們作孽的年數，你要在這些日子擔當以色列家的罪孽。

en: And when you have completed these, you shall lie down a second time, but on your right side, and bear the punishment of the house of Judah. Forty days I assign you, a day for each year.
zh: 這些日子滿了以後，你要再向右邊側臥，擔當猶大家的罪孽，我已經給你定了四十天，一天等於一年。

en: And you shall set your face toward the siege of Jerusalem, with your arm bared, and you shall prophesy against the city.
zh: 你要面向著被圍困的耶路撒冷，赤露著膀臂，說預言攻擊這城。

en: And behold, I will place cords upon you, so that you cannot turn from one side to the other, till you have completed the days of your siege.
zh: 我要用繩子把你捆綁起來，使你不能轉身，直等到你圍困城的日子滿了。

en: "And you, take wheat and barley, beans and lentils, millet and emmer, and put them into a single vessel and make your bread from them. During the number of days that you lie on your side, 390 days, you shall eat it.
zh: “你要拿小麥、大麥、豆子、扁豆、粟米和粗麥，放在一個器皿裡，給自己做餅。在你側臥的三百九十天裡，你都要吃這些餅。

en: And your food that you eat shall be by weight, twenty shekels a day; from day to day you shall eat it.
zh: 你所吃的食物要有一定分量，每天二百三十克，要在指定的時候吃。

en: And water you shall drink by measure, the sixth part of a hin; from day to day you shall drink.
zh: 你喝的水也要有一定分量，每天半公升，要在指定的時候喝。

en: And you shall eat it as a barley cake, baking it in their sight on human dung."
zh: 你吃這些餅，要像吃烙的大麥餅一樣，但要用人糞在眾人面前燒烤。”

en: And the LORD said, "Thus shall the people of Israel eat their bread unclean, among the nations where I will drive them."
zh: 耶和華說：“以色列人在我趕他們去的列國中，也要這樣吃不潔淨的食物。”

en: Then I said, "Ah, Lord GOD! Behold, I have never defiled myself. From my youth up till now I have never eaten what died of itself or was torn by beasts, nor has tainted meat come into my mouth."
zh: 我說：“主耶和華啊！我從來沒有玷污過自己。我從小到現在都沒有吃過已經死去的，或是野獸撕裂的動物，不潔淨的肉從沒有進過我的口。”

en: Then he said to me, "See, I assign to you cow's dung instead of human dung, on which you may prepare your bread."
zh: 於是他對我說：“你看，我准你用牛糞代替人糞，你可以在牛糞上烤你的餅。”

en: Moreover, he said to me, "Son of man, behold, I will break the supply of bread in Jerusalem. They shall eat bread by weight and with anxiety, and they shall drink water by measure and in dismay.
zh: 他又對我說：“人子啊，我要斷絕耶路撒冷的糧食。他們要滿心憂慮，吃配給的口糧；十分驚惶，喝配給的水。

en: I will do this that they may lack bread and water, and look at one another in dismay, and rot away because of their punishment.
zh: 他們缺糧缺水，各人都必驚惶，因自己的罪孽衰弱而死。”
